name: python3-flatbuffers
title: python3-flatbuffers
summary: efficient cross platform serialization library - Python bindings
description:
efficient cross platform serialization library - Python bindings
FlatBuffers is an efficient cross platform serialization library for C++, C#,
C, Go, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, and Python. It was originally
created at Google for game development and other performance-critical
applications.
.
This package contains python3 flatbuffers API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flatbuffers because efficient cross platform serialization library - Python bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flatbuffers as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flatbuffers with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flatbuffers --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
